title: alajja anomala
side_effects: Alajja anomala can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and stomach ulcers in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant without proper guidance can also lead to liver damage and kidney failure, particularly in people with pre-existing medical conditions. In rare cases, improper use of alajja anomala can cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant can disrupt hormonal balances, leading to issues such as irregular heartbeat and fertility problems.
